chunks.text:
Great job!  You've completed the lesson for Forensic Genetics!
To complete this lesson, you will need to complete the following assessments.  Clicking on the links below will open a new window.  Close that window to return to this screen.
Forensic DNA Evidence Assignment
When you have completed this assignment, submit it to your teacher and continue on to Module 8: Careers in Forensic Science.  Remember to return to complete the quiz after you receive feedback on your assignment.
Forensic Genetics Quiz
chunks.titleGuess: Great job! You've completed the lesson for Forensic Genetics!
